aesthetic_summary: Digitally refined portraiture focusing on a single East Asian female subject with accentuated features, often in selfie or close-up compositions, utilizing bright, soft lighting and a clean, varied color palette.
motif_usage_rules: Include 1-3 prominent motifs per prompt; bunny ears or frilly outfits frequently co-occur; smartphone often appears in indoor settings; avoid combining traditional formal wear with modern casual or cosplay elements.
compositional_rules: Dominated by close-up to medium shots (headshot, bust, half-body); camera perspective is eye-level or slightly high-angle; subject is centered or slightly off-center; subject maintains strong spatial dominance; background is secondary and often blurred or simplified.
recurrence_patterns: Against a simple, often textured wall
color_behavior: Frequent use of pastels (pink, cream, light blue) and white, alongside strong blues, black, and gold; black hair often provides stark contrast; suppressed hues generally include strong primary greens and intense yellows; moderate to high contrast on enhanced features, with an overall soft image appearance; saturation is moderate to high, particularly on clothing and makeup.
lighting_logic: Primary light source is soft and diffused, mimicking large window light or softbox; typically frontal or slightly overhead, minimizing harsh shadows on the face; consistently bright and even illumination; avoids dramatic, low-key, or high-contrast lighting setups.
texture_bias: Prefers smooth skin, soft and sheer fabrics (lace, satin, cotton, fur), and clean, uniform surfaces (e.g., concrete walls, phone screens); avoids rough, distressed, grimy, or overly organic/natural textures; exhibits a strong stylistic bias towards digitally smoothed and enhanced realism.
subject_treatment: Subject scale occupies 60-90% of the frame; intimate emotional distance with direct eye contact; poses are deliberate, ranging from subtly dynamic to static, emphasizing posture and facial expression; minimal interaction with the broader environment, typically interacting only with handheld props.
emotional_range: Expressive through accentuated facial features and direct eye contact, conveying a 'cute' or gently alluring mood; observational in its capture rather than dramatic action; moderate intensity ceiling, avoiding overt aggression, intense sadness, or high-octane excitement.
degradation_triggers: Introduction of harsh, directional lighting (e.g., strong side light, direct sunlight)
Overly dark or desaturated color palettes
Inclusion of rough, dirty, or heavily distressed textures
Cluttered or highly detailed backgrounds that distract from the subject
A subject whose facial features do not align with the 'cute' aesthetic (e.g., sharp, angular, or overly mature features)
Lack of digital smoothing or enhancement on skin and features
